name: rad-gws-core
description: Google Workspace integration via the `gws` CLI binary — 14 skills covering Gmail (send, read, reply, triage), Docs (write), Sheets (read, append), Slides, Drive, and Calendar. Trimmed from a 93-skill predecessor to the most-used surface. Useful for headless / scheduled / CI flows where session-based Anthropic-hosted Workspace MCPs don't apply. Will be superseded by a first-party Workspace MCP when one ships. Requires the `gws` CLI binary on PATH.
